meaning: adj.没有教养的,无礼貌的,不合人意的
examples: She thought my expression of indifference was ungracious and offensive.
Surely none of us would be an ungracious host.
This curt sumMary is not meant to be ungracious.
Roh has left a gift for both peoples even if the Americans have been especially ungracious about unwrapping it.
In fact, though it is ungracious to say, a lot of the fun of this fun book is in second-guessing the editor.
